name: dtctl: Test Coverage + Test Suite Speed

description: Baseline: score=1991.96, coverage=59.5%, time=29.87s (parallel execution — pkg/exec 23s is bottleneck)
Add NewForTesting() + update all resource/exec tests: time 29.87s→23.09s, score 1991→2572 (+29%)
Fix doctor test: inject http.Client, early-return on connectivity fail; cmd/ 13s→2.7s; score +55% vs baseline
Add handler tests for settings + lookup: coverage 59.4%→60.9%, score 3082→3066 (time variance, keep for coverage gain)
